mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_closure(parent_node_id, child_node_id, distance) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{nodeId}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE distance = distance

INSERT INTO agent_closure(parent_node_id, child_node_id, distance) SELECT parent_node_id, #{newUserId}, distance + 1 FROM agent_closure WHERE child_node_id = #{parentUserId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE distance = VALUES(distance)
